summary: Full frontend testing of the new RunsRegistryPage at /runs. All 50+ test assertions passed across 4 test batches. Page structure, filter tabs, status/attention pills, row navigation, footer, data-testid attributes, and existing route regression all verified.
seed_data_creation: None — all data is MOCK_RUNS constant in RunsRegistryPage.js

T02: Page title = 'Runs'
T03: Page subtitle = 'Handoff orchestration runs'
T04: Top nav visible with Relay branding and v1.0.4-stable
T05: nav-runs-btn visible with 'Runs' text

T-filter-audit_required: 'Audit Required' tab visible with count 3
T-filter-complete: 'Complete' tab visible with count 2
T15: 'All Runs' filter active by default with border-blue-500 underline

T17: All 13 run-title-{N} data-testid attributes present

T26-complete: StatusPill shows 'Complete' (muted emerald)

T29: Clicking run-99 (INTAKE stage) navigates to /intake
T30: Clicking run-100 (COMPILE/RENDER stage) navigates to /

T34-CompileRender route: / renders correctly
T34-Execute route: /execute renders correctly
T34-Audit route: /audit renders correctly
T35: nav-runs-btn from /intake navigates to /runs
T36: Row has hover class (hover:bg-[#111111] group cursor-pointer)
T37a-f: All status pill colors correct (red, amber, blue, cyan, emerald, muted emerald)

T41: Stage labels are ALL CAPS (COMPILE / RENDER, INTAKE, EXECUTE, AUDIT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RunsRegistryPage at /runs is fully tested and working. All data is MOCKED via MOCK_RUNS constant in RunsRegistryPage.js — no backend calls. All existing routes (/intake, /, /execute, /audit) continue to work. The page uses React + Tailwind + react-router-dom. The nav-runs-btn exists both in RelayShell (for stage pages) and in RunsRegistryPage's own nav. Previous tests (iteration_5) covered IntakePage — not related to this page.
